trans-unit.source: Argument cannot be null or empty
trans-unit.target: Argument cannot be null or empty

trans-unit.source: Created DependencyGraphSpec in {0:D2}ms.
trans-unit.target: Created DependencyGraphSpec in {0:D2}ms.

trans-unit.source: Determining projects to restore...
trans-unit.target: Determining projects to restore...

trans-unit.source: Cannot write the dependency graph spec because the generation failed.
trans-unit.target: Cannot write the dependency graph spec because the generation failed.

trans-unit.source: Duplicate '{0}' items found. Remove the duplicate items or use the Update functionality to ensure a consistent restore behavior. The duplicate '{0}' items are: {1}.
trans-unit.target: Duplicate '{0}' items found. Remove the duplicate items or use the Update functionality to ensure a consistent restore behavior. The duplicate '{0}' items are: {1}.

trans-unit.source: Cannot write the dependency graph spec because the `RestoreGraphOutputPath` is missing.
trans-unit.target: Cannot write the dependency graph spec because the `RestoreGraphOutputPath` is missing.

trans-unit.source: Package '{0}' does not have an exact version like '[1.0.0]'. Only exact versions are allowed with PackageDownload.
trans-unit.target: Package '{0}' does not have an exact version like '[1.0.0]'. Only exact versions are allowed with PackageDownload.
trans-unit.note: 0 - The package that does not have an exact version. Do not translate 'PackageDownload'.

trans-unit.source: Package '{0} {1}' does not have an exact version like '[1.0.0]'. Only exact versions are allowed with PackageDownload.
trans-unit.target: Package '{0} {1}' does not have an exact version like '[1.0.0]'. Only exact versions are allowed with PackageDownload.
trans-unit.note: 0 - The package that does not have an exact version. Do not translate 'PackageDownload'. 1 - the version string that's not exact.

trans-unit.source: Error parsing packages.config file at {0}: {1}
trans-unit.target: Error parsing packages.config file at {0}: {1}

trans-unit.source: Static graph-based restore failed with exit code '{0}' but did not log an error. Please file an issue at https://github.com/NuGet/Home.
trans-unit.target: Static graph-based restore failed with exit code '{0}' but did not log an error. Please file an issue at https://github.com/NuGet/Home.
trans-unit.note: 0 - the exit code of the process

trans-unit.source: An error occurred parsing command-line arguments in static graph-based restore as there was an unexpected number of arguments, {0}. Please file an issue at https://github.com/NuGet/Home
trans-unit.target: An error occurred parsing command-line arguments in static graph-based restore as there was an unexpected number of arguments, {0}. Please file an issue at https://github.com/NuGet/Home

trans-unit.source: An error occurred parsing command-line arguments in static graph-based restore as end of the standard input stream was unexpectedly encountered. Please file an issue at https://github.com/NuGet/Home
trans-unit.target: An error occurred parsing command-line arguments in static graph-based restore as end of the standard input stream was unexpectedly encountered. Please file an issue at https://github.com/NuGet/Home

trans-unit.source: An error occurred parsing command-line arguments in static graph-based restore as an exception occurred reading the standard input stream, {0} Please file an issue at https://github.com/NuGet/Home {1}
trans-unit.target: An error occurred parsing command-line arguments in static graph-based restore as an exception occurred reading the standard input stream, {0} Please file an issue at https://github.com/NuGet/Home {1}
trans-unit.note: 0 - The exception message 1 - The string representation of the exception

trans-unit.source: An error occurred parsing command-line arguments in static graph-based restore as the first integer read, {0}, is not an allowable value. Please file an issue at https://github.com/NuGet/Home
trans-unit.target: An error occurred parsing command-line arguments in static graph-based restore as the first integer read, {0}, is not an allowable value. Please file an issue at https://github.com/NuGet/Home
trans-unit.note: 0 - The value of the first integer read from the stream

trans-unit.source: An error occurred starting static graph-based restore. {0}. Please file an issue at https://github.com/NuGet/Home
trans-unit.target: An error occurred starting static graph-based restore. {0}. Please file an issue at https://github.com/NuGet/Home

trans-unit.source: Static graph-based restore encountered an unhandled exception. Please file an issue at https://github.com/NuGet/Home. The exception was: {0}
trans-unit.target: Static graph-based restore encountered an unhandled exception. Please file an issue at https://github.com/NuGet/Home. The exception was: {0}

trans-unit.source: ProjectReference '{0}' was resolved using '{1}' instead of the project target framework '{2}'. This project may not be fully compatible with your project.
trans-unit.target: ProjectReference '{0}' was resolved using '{1}' instead of the project target framework '{2}'. This project may not be fully compatible with your project.
trans-unit.note: 0 - referenced project path 1 - resolved tfm 2 - project tfm

trans-unit.source: All packages listed in {0} are already installed.
trans-unit.target: All packages listed in {0} are already installed.

trans-unit.source: The solution did not have any projects to restore, ensure that all projects are known to be MSBuild and that the projects exist.
trans-unit.target: The solution did not have any projects to restore, ensure that all projects are known to be MSBuild and that the projects exist.

trans-unit.source: The solution contains '{0}' project(s) '{1}' that are not known to MSBuild. Ensure that all projects are known to be MSBuild before running restore on the solution.
trans-unit.target: The solution contains '{0}' project(s) '{1}' that are not known to MSBuild. Ensure that all projects are known to be MSBuild before running restore on the solution.
trans-unit.note: 0 - number of projects not known to msbuild 1 - list of projects

trans-unit.source: RestoreNoCache is deprecated and has been renamed to RestoreNoHttpCache. Please use RestoreNoHttpCache instead.
trans-unit.target: RestoreNoCache is deprecated and has been renamed to RestoreNoHttpCache. Please use RestoreNoHttpCache instead.
trans-unit.note: Do not translate RestoreNoCache and RestoreNoHttpCache

trans-unit.source: Running command: '{0}' {1}
trans-unit.target: Running command: '{0}' {1}
trans-unit.note: 0 - the path to the EXE being launched 1 - The command-line arguments

trans-unit.source: Project '{0}' targets '{2}'. It cannot be referenced by a project that targets '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Project '{0}' targets '{2}'. It cannot be referenced by a project that targets '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: Unable to find a project to restore!
trans-unit.target: Unable to find a project to restore!

trans-unit.source: Nothing to do. None of the projects specified contain packages to restore.
trans-unit.target: Nothing to do. None of the projects specified contain packages to restore.

trans-unit.source: Evaluated {0} project(s) in {1:D2}ms ({2} builds, {3} failures).
trans-unit.target: Evaluated {0} project(s) in {1:D2}ms ({2} builds, {3} failures).

trans-unit.source: Restore canceled!
trans-unit.target: Restore canceled!

trans-unit.source: No solution found. Restore against a solution or pass in /p:SolutionDir
trans-unit.target: No solution found. Restore against a solution or pass in /p:SolutionDir

trans-unit.source: The project fallback framework '{0}' is not a supported target framework.
trans-unit.target: The project fallback framework '{0}' is not a supported target framework.

trans-unit.source: The project target framework '{0}' is not a supported target framework.
trans-unit.target: The project target framework '{0}' is not a supported target framework.

trans-unit.source: Invalid PackageSaveMode value '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Invalid PackageSaveMode value '{0}'.
